author: Vincent Voyer
subject: test(functional): make them work, explain how to run (#2146)
body:
I must say I am unsure about the added value of those functional tests.

It adds a good amount of code and orchestration. Ultimately starting
from now (if we merge this), they should run on Travis and I hope one
day they will crash and we will be able to say "Phew! Thanks we had
those functional tests".

Let me know what you think
